channel.title: Encode on Tech Tracker
channel.description: Recent content in Encode on Tech Tracker

item.title: How to encode videos without PC on Andriod using FFmpeg.
item.description: <img src="https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/-9wdDE-f33fs/Yf1NFuubqkI/AAAAAAAAJBQ/GU9NSGXhzrQlSJSyXx1qq3e4kkcQAPMgQCNcBGAsYHQ/s1600/1643990292169085-0.png" alt=""> We have numerous video formats and each format has it’s own technology, so you will find differences in terms of size, quality etc, people use different types of video and audio formats to get desired output for ex : .mkv or hevc with .h264 or h.265 are popular formats to get video at high quality at lowest size possible. Likewise, audio also play important role in video size, if you choose a uncompressed audio format like .
